Pembrolizumab 10 mg/kg every 2 weeks or every 3 weeks; comparator was four doses of ipilimumab 3 mg/kg every 3 weeks
dose.pred: 10 mg/kg every 2 weeks, 10 mg/kg every 3 weeks, 3 mg/kg every 3 weeks
